name: hat-monorepo
description: HAT - Human Attention Token: Verified human attention marketplace on Arc

scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter @hat/web build && wrangler pages deploy packages/web/dist --project-name=hat
scripts.deploy:advertiser: pnpm --filter @hat/advertiser build && wrangler pages deploy packages/advertiser/dist --project-name=hat-advertiser
